name: Aziz Ansari
bio: Aziz Ansari is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer known for high-energy material on relationships, technology, and modern dating. He played Tom Haverford on Parks and Recreation and co-created and starred in Netflixs Master of None. In 2018 a published account of a date prompted public scrutiny, which he later addressed in his stand-up.

timeline.ev: Begins performing stand-up while a student at NYU
Cast as Tom Haverford on Parks and Recreation
Releases debut special Intimate Moments for a Sensual Evening
Co-creates and stars in Netflixs Master of None
Releases the Netflix special Right Now

accolades: Two Primetime Emmy Awards for Master of None
Golden Globe for Best Actor in a TV Comedy, first for an Asian American
Grammy nomination for Best Comedy Album for Right Now

specials.t: Intimate Moments for a Sensual Evening

bits.t: Clears Up the Pizza Swastika Story
